name: kabir-ai
description: Kabir AI v6 — HDMI capture card audio listening, 10-user profiles, screen capture, stealth overlay

scripts.build: tsc && npm run bundle && npm run copy-assets
scripts.copy-assets: shx cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/ && shx cp src/renderer/renderer.css dist/renderer/ && shx cp dist/renderer/renderer.bundle.js dist/renderer/renderer.js
